title: Add internal links to new page
description: New page https://www.pipeleap.com/ has fewer than 2 inbound internal links. Add contextual links from at least 2 existing pages in the same cluster.

title: Title too short (8 chars)
description: AI-generated or auto-populated titles under 30 characters are unlikely to be descriptive enough for search snippets.

title: Missing H1
description: The page does not expose a primary H1 heading.

title: No structured data (JSON-LD) detected
description: The page has no JSON-LD schema markup. Structured data is required for rich results (FAQ, HowTo, Article, Product) and helps Google understand page context for AI Overviews.

title: Meta description too short (48 chars)
description: Short meta descriptions (under 70 characters) waste the snippet space and reduce click-through rates.

title: No WebSite structured data detected
description: No WebSite JSON-LD schema was found across crawled pages. Google uses WebSite structured data (with name and url properties) to determine the preferred site name shown in search results. Without it, Google may display an inaccurate or sub-optimal site name.

title: Content draft: Apollo.io vs Clay vs Pipeleap: What Is the Difference?

Keyword: how to build outbound sales system for B2B SaaS

Publish next content plan brief
description: No site changes detected. Growth mode: publish next queued blog post from content_plan_briefs.json. Prioritise alternative/comparison cluster (highest conversion probability: 0.91).

title: Internal linking audit — reinforce pillar pages
description: Growth mode: run linking cluster map from serp_strategy.py. Ensure every spoke article links to its pillar page. Add missing anchor text links from blog posts to /gtm-audit.

title: Improve low-CTR pages from GSC
description: Growth mode: pull pages with >100 impressions and <3% CTR from GSC. Rewrite meta descriptions to match the top triggering query per page.

title: Resubmit sitemap to GSC
description: Growth mode: ping GSC sitemap endpoint to trigger a fresh crawl. Ensures any recent content is picked up in the next index cycle.

title: Add new glossary term from keyword gaps
description: Growth mode: pick the top-traffic, low-difficulty keyword from SERP_KEYWORD_CLUSTERS that lacks a dedicated glossary page. Create it.
